questionHtml: Describe the major characteristics of a eutrophic lake.
markschemeHtml:
a. normally shallow ✔

b. low water visibility
OR
high levels of nutrients/phosphates/potassium
OR
low oxygen concentration
OR
high BOD ✔

c. high net primary productivity
OR
algal bloom
OR
low biodiversity ✔

meta.title: Describe the major characteristics of a eutrophic lake.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Additional higher level topics)
